---
name: Skill request
about: Suggest a new skill for the Blooper marketplace.
title: "[skill-request] <suggested-name>"
labels: skill-request
assignees: ""
---

## What problem does this solve

<!-- One paragraph: who is the user, what are they trying to do, and why is the
manual workflow painful enough that a skill would help? Concrete example
welcome. -->

## Suggested name and publisher

- Suggested slug: `<publisher>/<skill-slug>`
- Publisher: <your handle, org, or "open to anyone">

## What inputs and outputs

- **Inputs (params):**
  - e.g. `script` (file_version, current_folder), `tone` (select)
- **Context (applies_to):**
  - e.g. folder_kind: storyboard
- **Outputs:**
  - e.g. file_versions in the current folder, ~6 image versions

## Tools the skill would call

<!-- Best-guess list of built-in tools or "needs a new tool for X". -->

## Are you offering to implement

- [ ] Yes, I will open a PR.
- [ ] Maybe, I would pair with a maintainer.
- [ ] No, this is a request only.

## Additional context

<!-- Links to similar tools, screenshots of the user workflow today, anything
that helps shape the design. -->
